decisions.reasoning: Hurricane is a guaranteed OHKO on Urshifu-Rapid-Strike, and I outspeed it, making this the optimal play to remove a major threat immediately.

Tornadus-Therian is at 26% and will be OHKOed by Wild Charge or 2HKOed by Ice Punch. Switching to Incineroar provides an Intimidate drop to mitigate physical damage and safely pivot or check the Iron Hands.
Incineroar is threatened with an OHKO by Drain Punch and cannot secure a KO itself. Switching to Tornadus-Therian provides a safe pivot to resist the Fighting-type move and maintain momentum.

Tornadus-Therian is at 37% and will be OHKOed by Wild Charge. Switching to Incineroar provides an Intimidate drop to mitigate Iron Hands' damage output and allows me to pivot or check the threat safely.
Incineroar is fainted; I must switch to a healthy Pokemon. Tornadus-Therian resists Iron Hands' Drain Punch, providing a safe pivot point to scout the opponent's next move.

Tornadus-Therian is threatened with an OHKO by Iron Hands' Wild Charge and cannot secure a KO in return. Switching to Calyrex-Ice is the safest play as it resists Wild Charge and threatens Iron Hands with its STAB moves.
High Horsepower is a 2HKO and provides super-effective damage against Iron Hands. Since I am ahead in the exchange and the opponent cannot OHKO me, attacking is the optimal play to secure the KO.

Glacial Lance is a guaranteed OHKO on Flutter Mane, and since I am currently faster than the opponent's predicted move or can secure the kill regardless of their action, I should take the KO immediately.

Calyrex-Ice has fainted, so I must send in a replacement. Kingambit is the best choice to check Flutter Mane due to its resistance to Ghost and Fairy moves and its ability to threaten back with Sucker Punch.
Knock Off is the best play to remove Flutter Mane's Booster Energy, which significantly weakens its offensive pressure for the rest of the match, while also dealing respectable damage.

Hurricane is the strongest move available and provides a 3HKO, which is the best path to progress. Since Tornadus-Therian is at 54% and Flutter Mane can 2HKO with Moonblast, I must prioritize damage output to potentially force a trade or weaken it for a priority user like Kingambit.
Tornadus-Therian is at 15% HP and Flutter Mane is at 12% HP. Hurricane has a high chance to KO Flutter Mane this turn, and since I am slower, I must attack to secure the KO before being knocked out.
